function.name: run_mlb_bootstrap_jobs
function.description: Request execution of approved MLB bootstrap jobs. The application validates the request, loads approved YAML job files, and executes deterministic local steps.

mode.description: Whether to run an explicit list of jobs or a named profile.

job_ids.description: Explicit approved job ids to execute when mode is job_ids.

profile.description: Named approved bootstrap profile when mode is profile.

variables.description: Runtime variable overrides such as DATA_ROOT, PROJECT_ROOT, POSTGRES_DSN, START_DATE, END_DATE.
